title: Cobblemon Conquest
description: The modpack of every Cobblemon player's dreams (well those who want to spice up their game)
body:
A modpack filled to the brim with exciting features! Adventure on your own or if you're looking for some friendly fun, join our server! Cobblemon Conquest!

  This modpack includes features such as: 
 - Mega Showdown | Face off against your friends with never before seen limits! Hey kiddo, ever heard of Mega Charizard? We got you covered!
 - Performance Mods | Oh performance mods, our favorite. Even on lower end computers, your game will run silky smooth with our Pandora's Box of Performance Mods (Such as Sodium, Lithium, C2me, Iris, Ferrite Core, and Leaf Culling)!
 - Iris and Shaders | Speaking of Iris, we have built-in shader support aswell! Make your game look fabulous with shaders!

  With all of that being said, we hope you enjoy this modpack! Theres still more to come aswell so stick around for the fun!
